final_reasoning: The image shows a residential street with characteristics typical of Australia or New Zealand. Key indicators include: (1) Right-hand drive vehicles parked on the left side of the road. (2) The style of the utility poles and electrical transformers is very common in Australia. (3) The architecture of the single-story houses with tiled roofs and wooden fences is typical of Australian suburbs. (4) The vegetation, including the specific types of eucalyptus and other greenery, suggests a temperate climate in the Southern Hemisphere. (5) The road markings (dashed white lines at the intersection) and the general layout of the curbs and sidewalks are consistent with Australian standards. (6) The license plates, though blurred, have the proportions and colors common in Australian states. Based on the overall suburban aesthetic and infrastructure, this is located in Australia, specifically in a residential area of Melbourne, Victoria.
